description: Pre-canned SIEM response for composition (app-spawned-shell baseline confirmed BUT 100007 co-firing) scenario (wazuh-rule-100001)

response.summary: 847 prior 100001 events for this image over 30 days, all from proc.pname=imagemagick-convert with sh -c 'gs ...' cmdline shape. Established pattern dating back 54 days (since the current image was deployed). This is a routine ImageMagick → ghostscript shell-out pattern; the baseline is well-established.

correlated_falco_events.query: rule.id:[100000 TO 100099] AND data.output_fields.container.id:9z8y7x6w5v4u AND @timestamp:[now-15m TO now+15m]

response.summary: Rule 100007 (Drop and execute new binary) co-fired from the same container 3 seconds after the shell event. The dropped binary is /tmp/.x1, which is not present in the image's layer manifest.

rule.description: Falco: Drop and execute new binary in container
